infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used to record audio for transcription.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Used to transcribe your voice captures.

infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Used to show and create events in your calendar.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to attach photos to your tasks.
